prompt: A [domestic space] at the moment of [domestic transition] — [lens] at room-level, the space showing evidence of [transition from state] and [transition to state] simultaneously, [personal objects] establishing inhabitation and the specific person or family who lives here, [light quality] the available light of the [domestic space] at [time of day], no staging — photographed as it actually is during [domestic transition], documentary domestic architecture still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
